title: Fresh Skeleton Physics
description: Give skeletons physics - Now with Fresh Animations!
body:
## Give skeletons physics - Now with Fresh Animations!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/fresh-skeleton-physics)




[Fresh Animations is required!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) This pack makes it so that when any of the skeleton entities die, instead of falling over to the side like normal, they collapse into a pile of bones! Now with Fresh Animations support! This pack is fully compatible with Fresh Animations!
